channel.title: livforpasta
channel.description: PREORDER MY COOKBOOK EAT LIKE THE RICH - LINK IN MY LINKTREE!! @oliviatied on Insta Private chef 👩🏻‍🍳 Alix@thedigitalbrandarchitects.com

item.title: lemme tell you what's been goin on.. MY COOKBOOK IS FINALLY OUT ...
item.description:
lemme tell you what's been goin on.. MY COOKBOOK IS FINALLY OUT FOR PRESALE!!!! Sooo much time and effort went into this book and I'm so excited to finally share it with you all. LINK IN MY LINKTREE AND BIO I hope you fucking love it and thank you for being my people. EAT LIKE THE RICH!!!! Signed copies available @kalnyc @barnesandnoble @booksamillion
#EATLIKETHERICH
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
